chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1502 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4264/2025 (C/A) 24-11-2025 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate along with Petitioner Aslam Parvez Rajput Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned Additional AG has produced one original Cheque No.1186713938 for Rs.93013/- of NBP Ubauro Branch in favour of the Petitioner. The original cheque is handed over to the Petitioner, who is present in Court under proper acknowledgment. Learned Addl.AG submits that entire outstanding amount has now been paid to the petitioner, which fact is affirmed by counsel for the Petitioner. In the circumstances, the listed application having served its purpose is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
